title: Prevent repeated dialogue/panels in generated comic content

requirements.text: Add a deduplication step for comic dialogue/panel text so that repeated lines are removed from the generated comic content before rendering/exporting.

quotes: yes make sure there isn't repition

acceptanceCriteria: If the same exact line appears multiple times in the input script, only the first occurrence is kept in the final output.
If the same exact line appears consecutively (back-to-back), the final output contains only one instance.
Deduplication preserves the original ordering of the remaining lines.
Deduplication is applied consistently to both the main scene panels and the credits panels (if credits are generated from a list of lines).

requirements.text: Expose a clear, user-facing indication that repetition removal is active (e.g., a toggle or label) and ensure all user-facing text is in English.

quotes: yes make sure there isn't repition

acceptanceCriteria: The UI contains an English label indicating repetition removal (and if configurable, an English toggle).
When repetition removal is enabled, the rendered list of panels in the UI does not display duplicate lines per the deduplication rules.

requirements.text: Apply a coherent, comic-inspired visual theme across the frontend (colors, typography, spacing, and panel styling) and use it consistently throughout the app.

quotes: # Create a full comic-style PDF using reportlab (Platypus)
yes make sure there isn't repition

acceptanceCriteria: The app uses a consistent comic-inspired theme (e.g., bold headings, high-contrast palette, panel-like containers) across all screens/components.
The theme avoids blue/purple as the primary palette unless explicitly requested later.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose them instead).
Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor (all logic in backend/main.mo).
nonGoals: Implementing Python/ReportLab execution on the Internet Computer.
Adding third-party authentication beyond Internet Identity.
